title: Rep. Jamaal Bowman unseated in NY, Boebert wins GOP nod
shortDescription: A shift after the latest primary elections left New York's Congressman Jamal Bowman to lose his seat, signaling a rift within the Democratic Party.

title: Commission on Presidential Debates cancels contracts for election year
shortDescription: Weeks after Trump and Biden bucked debate tradition, the Commission on Presidential Debates has stepped down.

title: Judge skeptical of Trump bid to remove docs from trial | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: President Joe Biden's approach to Thursday's debate. | Biden pardons thousands of veterans convicted under a military law that banned gay sex.

title: Supreme Court says Biden can weigh in on social media misinformation
shortDescription: The decision threw out a conservative challenge to the administration's push to get social media companies to remove posts it considered misinformation.

title: Former Republican Rep. Adam Kinzinger endorses Biden ahead of debate
shortDescription: 'It’s because of my unwavering support for democracy, that today, as a proud conservative, I am endorsing Joe Biden for reelection,' Kinzinger said.

title: Kristi Noem travels for out-of-state GOP events as South Dakota floods
shortDescription: With a disaster rivaling the 2011 Missouri River Flood in her home state, Gov. Kristi Noem is making time to fly for out-of-state appearances at GOP campaign events.

title: Biden pardons vets convicted during military ban on gay sex
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is pardoning thousands of LGBTQ+ veterans convicted under a gay sex ban, allowing them to apply for previously withheld benefits.

title: Hunter Biden's gun purchase was illegal for another reason
shortDescription: If a Delaware gun shop had followed federal law, Hunter Biden might have avoided his felony gun charges.

title: Who risks more in tomorrow's debate: Trump or Biden?
shortDescription: The upcoming presidential debate on CNN is more of a gamble for Joe Biden than for Donald Trump.

title: Trump's obvious choice for running mate? The one he'll never make.
shortDescription: Nikki Haley on the ticket would heal the GOP and appeal to voters he doesn't. But other factors matter more this time.

title: How Ohio's Supreme Court elections could impact abortion access
shortDescription: The fate of Ohio's abortion restrictions hinges on November's state Supreme Court elections, which could decide the court's majority.

title: Biden and Trump debate this week: Everything you need to know
shortDescription: Joe Biden and Donald Trump will take the debate stage on Thursday. CNN anchors Dana Bash and Jake Tapper will moderate. What time does it start?

title: Judge criticized as pro-Trump leans toward prosecutors on documents
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump appeared not to convince Judge Aileen Cannon to exclude FBI-seized records from his criminal classified documents case.

title: Federal judge in Trump case should be impeached, Monica Lewinsky says
shortDescription: Monica Lewinsky said she hopes Judge Aileen Cannon, who is overseeing former President Donald Trump’s classified documents case, is impeached.

title: Biden-Trump debate: A look back at their previous debates' viewership
shortDescription: Presidential debates between Trump and Biden have a history of zingers, but what do debate viewership numbers look like?

title: Student loan borrowers waiting (again) for relief Biden promised
shortDescription: This week wasn’t the first time, nor will it likely be the last, that lawsuits put a damper on one of Biden's signature student loan repayment plans.
